lesson_title: Places, Directions and Local Life: Vocabulary Lesson 2
learning_objective: Learners can name, identify, ask and answer basic questions in a vocabulary task about food.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases for immediate needs.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise vocabulary for places, directions and local life. You will learn useful language connected to food and practise basic imperatives. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at A1 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: basic imperatives. Vocabulary theme: food. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At A1, learners should name, identify, ask and answer basic questions with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use basic imperatives to talk about food.
Example 2: The learner gives a A1 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for A1.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using basic imperatives.
options: Correct use of basic imperatives in a A1 sentence.
Incorrect word order with basic imperatives.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses basic imperatives accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of basic imperatives.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the food phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand food.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand food.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form basic imperatives. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about food using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: A1 Vocabulary Check - Places, Directions and Local Life
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short vocabulary task using basic imperatives and vocabulary from food.
success_criteria: Uses basic imperatives with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses basic imperatives and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to food.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about food. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short A1 response about food. Include the target language: basic imperatives.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for A1-M04-L02. Speaker one: Today we are practising food. Speaker two: I need to use basic imperatives correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Basic Imperatives form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for basic imperatives
